visualNotes: oval artisan sourdough loaf silhouette
deep scoring and a clearly opened ear crust
toasted brown crust with light flour dusting
cute but composed face and steady posture
promptBase: Premium bakery mascot character made from a real artisan sourdough loaf, elegant and cute, luxury Korean bakery branding, warm ivory and toasted caramel palette, soft studio lighting, refined packaging mood, clean silhouette, mobile-friendly, no text, transparent background.

rarityPrompts.common: Show the base artisan loaf identity with clean scoring and warm bakery charm.
rarityPrompts.rare: Style it with one or two premium atelier adornments that match an INTJ personality, such as refined grain garnish or tailored bakery seal detail.
rarityPrompts.superRare: Style it as a flagship atelier collectible with two or three couture adornments, luxury grain ornaments, prestige seal details, and clearly visible luxury lighting effects.
